title: 10. Sensory Sources
description: The core mental model for Vision, hidden PING/PONG, source tabs, and supervisor-style behavior addons.

steps.title: What Sensory Sources Are
steps.body: Sensory sources let NC observe context outside the chat box. Screen, Clipboard, Webcam, and Heart Rate are optional inputs that can become hidden context or trigger behaviors.

steps.title: Open Host -> Vision
steps.body: Vision is the host page for sensory sources. It controls which sources exist, whether hidden PING/PONG runs, and whether hidden outputs may speak or generate images.

steps.title: Included Sources
steps.body: The source selector decides which source tabs are active. If a source tutorial mentions a missing tab, add that source here first.

steps.title: Hidden PING/PONG
steps.body: Hidden PING/PONG lets NC observe in the background and keep useful context for later. It is separate from ordinary visible chat messages.

steps.title: Speech and Image Policy
steps.body: These policy toggles decide whether hidden sensory results may proactively speak or request images. Keep them off for a quieter companion.

steps.title: Supervisor Pattern
steps.body: Supervisor addons attach behavior to a source. The shared pattern is source, persona, trigger, action, strictness, and optional emotion override.
